nasb.text: When Judah turned around, behold, they were attacked both front and rear; so they cried to the Lord, and the priests blew the trumpets.

esv.text: And when Judah looked, behold, the battle was in front of and behind them. And they cried to the Lord, and the priests blew the trumpets.

cnv.text: 猶大人轉身，看見自己前後受敵，就呼求耶和華，祭司也都吹號。

ccb.text: 犹大人转身，发现自己前后受敌，就呼求耶和华。祭司吹响号角，
